login.title: Run the platform from one control plane.
login.description: A separate workspace for platform health, interview quality, and growth metrics without mixing candidate and company experiences.
login.feature1Body: Track users, companies, interviews, and reports from one place.
login.feature2Body: Quickly inspect environment state, AI mode, and overall system readiness.
login.formSubtitle: Use the dedicated platform admin credentials.
login.failed: Failed to sign in to admin console
login.note: Local development uses a dedicated platform admin account.

hero.title: AI Recruit operational overview
hero.description: Monitor growth, interview throughput, and runtime state without dropping into separate product workspaces.

runtime.title: Runtime and modes
runtime.subtitle: Quick readout of environment and system switches.

throughput.title: Platform throughput
throughput.subtitle: How the interview funnel is moving across the system.

recentCompanies.title: Recent companies
recentCompanies.subtitle: Latest company workspaces and their owners.

recentReports.title: Recent reports
recentReports.subtitle: Latest assessment reports generated by the platform.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.description: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

sharedProfile.requestOnlyDescription: This candidate uses request-only visibility. Companies need explicit approval before workspace access is granted.
sharedProfile.publicDescription: Structured interview results shared directly by the candidate. Marketplace discovery is disabled for this profile.
sharedProfile.requestOnlyHelp: Reports stay hidden on this page until the candidate approves a company access request.

access.signInHint: Sign in as a company user to request workspace access.

errors.noLongerAvailable: This shared profile is no longer available.

reports.hidden: Interview reports are hidden until access is approved.
reports.empty: No public interview reports are attached to this shared profile yet.

description.candidate: {company} invited you to complete a private AI screening flow for {role}.
description.internal: {company} invited you to complete a private AI assessment as part of an internal review flow.

flow.visibilityPrefix: Your answers will be reviewed by AI and the results will remain visible only to

state.completedBody: This invite has already been completed. {company} can already access the private report.
state.expiredBody: This invite can no longer be started. Contact the company if you need a new campaign link.
state.lockedBody: This module is already part of the assessment plan, but its runtime is not available in the candidate flow yet.
state.finalizingBody: The current module is already finishing in the background. Return to the interview tab if it is still open.

actions.needAccount: You need a candidate account to continue.

modules.title: Assessment modules
modules.subtitle: Complete the current module to unlock the next step in the plan.

checklist.title: Before you begin
checklist.emailBody: The assessment is locked to the email on this page. A different candidate account will be rejected.
checklist.timeBody: Once started, the flow becomes an in-progress private campaign linked to your account.
checklist.privateBody: This report will not be exposed in the public candidate marketplace.
checklist.templateDefault: This campaign uses the adaptive default interview.

hero.title: Verify your skills.
hero.description: Complete an AI interview, get a clear report about your strengths, and apply with more confidence. Companies see more than a resume alone.
hero.note: Free to start. No credit card required.

heroPanel.title: Candidate journey
heroPanel.subtitle: What you get after the interview
heroPanel.summaryText: One clear flow: resume, interview, report, and a stronger position for applications.
heroPanel.benefit1Text: See strengths, growth areas, and level across key competencies.
heroPanel.benefit2Text: Understand which roles and openings you can target with more confidence.
heroPanel.benefit3Text: Companies see validated signals, not just resume lines.

how.title: How it works
how.subtitle: Two sides of the same platform.

step1.title: Upload your resume
step1.desc: PDF or DOCX. Skills and experience are extracted automatically.

step2.title: Complete AI interview
step2.desc: Adaptive questions tailored to your role. Answer by text or voice.

step3.title: Get your skill report
step3.desc: Assessment across hard skills, problem solving, communication, soft skills, and consistency.

step4.title: Join the database
step4.desc: Verified professionals become visible to hiring companies.

step1.title: Browse verified candidates
step1.desc: Filter by role, score, and hiring recommendation.

step2.title: View detailed reports
step2.desc: Competency heatmaps, skill matrices, red flags, and per-question analysis.

step3.title: Assess your employees
step3.desc: Send invite links for internal reviews and skill audits.

step4.title: Make data-driven decisions
step4.desc: Hire from verified evidence, not just CVs and gut feeling.

features.title: Everything you need
features.subtitle: Built on industrial and organizational psychology research. Powered by state-of-the-art LLMs.

ai.title: Adaptive AI Interviewer
ai.desc: Questions adapt based on the resume and previous answers. The AI follows up on weak spots and digs deeper into strengths.

science.title: Scientific Assessment
science.desc: Two-pass LLM pipeline: per-question evidence extraction followed by competency scoring with calibrated rubrics.

heatmap.title: Competency Heatmaps
heatmap.desc: Ten competencies per role are scored individually. See exactly where a candidate excels and where they need growth.

voice.title: Voice Interviews
voice.desc: Candidates can answer by voice using speech-to-text. Questions can also be read aloud by AI.

team.title: Multi-user Teams
team.desc: Invite recruiters to your company account. Admins manage access, members browse candidates and reports.

employee.title: Employee Assessments
employee.desc: Send invite links to existing employees for performance review, promotion decisions, or skill audits.

flags.title: Red Flag Detection
flags.desc: Automatic detection of contradictions, fabricated experience, evasive answers, and inconsistencies across responses.

dimensions.title: 5 Score Dimensions
dimensions.desc: Overall score, hard skills, soft skills, communication, and problem solving — all backed by weighted competency aggregation.

companies.title: 8 role-specific competency matrices
companies.description1: Each role has a unique competency matrix with ten skills, category weights, and behaviorally anchored rating scales. No generic scoring — every assessment is tailored to the position.
companies.description2: Create custom interview templates with your own question sets and mark them public so candidates can self-select into your pipeline.

cta.title: Ready to get started?
cta.subtitle: Complete the interview, get your report, and use it as a stronger starting point for hiring. If you are a company, you can join the platform too.

companyEmployees.title: Assessment Campaigns
companyEmployees.subtitle: Run private AI assessment campaigns for employees or external candidates, attach a template, set a deadline, and track invite lifecycle through completion.
companyEmployees.readonly: Read-only mode: only admins can create or delete campaigns.

form.templateLocked: Template questions: {count}. Role is locked to {role}.
form.handsOnSubtitle: Optionally append role-aware coding and SQL tasks after the core adaptive interview.

guide.title: How this campaign behaves
guide.private: The invite remains private and never appears in the public marketplace.
guide.opened: `opened` means the landing page was viewed but the interview has not started yet.
guide.deadline: `deadline` and `expires_at` both block new starts once the timestamp is reached.
guide.completed: Completed campaigns expose company-scoped report and replay links directly from this page.
guide.branding: Branding only changes the invite experience; report visibility still stays company-scoped.

empty.title: No assessment campaigns yet
empty.description: Create a private campaign for an employee or external candidate, optionally attach a custom template, and track invite lifecycle through completion.

companyEmployees.pendingNotice: {count} campaigns have not been opened yet. These are still good candidates for follow-up.

companyCandidate.viewerMode: Viewer mode: you can review notes, reports, and replay, but not modify pipeline state.

shortlists.title: Shortlists
shortlists.subtitle: Organize this candidate into reusable hiring buckets.

notes.title: Shared Notes
notes.placeholder: Add context for your team: interview feedback, follow-up ideas, concerns.

companySettings.title: Access and security settings
companySettings.subtitle: Manage company account access and keep your team workspace secure.
companySettings.passwordHint: Update the password for this company account. Use a unique password with at least 8 characters.
companySettings.securityCardBody: Rotate passwords after handing off access to a new teammate and avoid reusing the same password in other services.
companySettings.sessionCardBody: After changing the password, make sure only active teammates still have access to the company workspace.

errors.minLength: New password must be at least 8 characters

ai.title: AI workspace controls
ai.subtitle: Review the active runtime stack and set workspace preferences for future interviews and reports.
ai.readonly: Only the company admin can edit AI workspace controls.

hints.proctoringPolicy: This policy is applied immediately to new company assessment interviews when client signals are normalized.
hints.interviewerModel: Stored as a workspace preference for model-aware interview runtimes.
hints.assessorModel: Stored as a workspace preference for model-aware report scoring runtimes.

runtime.appliedNote: Today this panel actively controls proctoring policy for new company assessment interviews. Model preferences are stored now and can be wired into later module runtimes without losing admin intent.

errors.adminOnly: Only the company admin can manage AI settings

companyDashboard.viewerMode: Viewer mode: reports, replay, and analytics are available read-only.

analytics.noSalaryData: No salary data yet for the current analytics filter.

invite.shareOnce: Share this once — it won't be shown again.
invite.existingUser: User already existed and has been added to your team.

companyTemplates.subtitle: Create custom question sets for candidates.
companyTemplates.readonly: Read-only mode: only admins can create or delete templates.

form.title: New template
form.name: Name
form.makePublic: Make public (visible to all candidates on the interview start page)

empty.title: No templates yet

companyReplay.transcriptHint: Transcript view is built from the saved interviewer and candidate messages for this interview.

candidateDashboard.title: Welcome back
candidateDashboard.subtitle: Complete each step to build your verified profile.

shareHelp.directLink: Anyone with this link can open the shared profile.
shareHelp.requestOnly: Companies with this link can request workspace access. You approve or deny those requests below.

private.title: Private
private.body: Your profile stays hidden from marketplace companies and direct links.

marketplace.title: Marketplace
marketplace.body: Companies can discover your profile, reports, and salary expectations in the public talent database.

directLink.title: Direct link
directLink.body: Your profile is hidden from marketplace search, but anyone with your link can open the shared profile.

requestOnly.title: Request only
requestOnly.body: Your profile is hidden from marketplace search. Companies need your approval before they can open it in their workspace.

accessRequests.title: Companies requesting your profile
accessRequests.description: These are companies asking to view your profile and reports when you use the request-only visibility mode. You decide who gets access.
accessRequests.empty: No one has requested access to your profile yet.

steps.uploadResumeDesc: Upload your CV in PDF or DOCX to get started
steps.startInterviewDesc: Complete a structured interview for your target role
steps.viewReportsDesc: See your assessment scores and hiring recommendation

candidateReports.title: My interviews
candidateReports.emptyDescription: Complete an AI interview to receive your assessment report.

candidateResume.title: Upload resume
candidateResume.subtitle: PDF or DOCX, up to 10 MB. Your active resume is used for AI interviews.
candidateResume.nextStepBody: After upload, you can move straight into the interview for your target role.

candidateProfile.title: My profile
candidateProfile.subtitle: Manage your account and active resume.
candidateProfile.resumeCardHint: Your current resume is used for new interviews and shared profile links.

interviewStart.title: Start AI interview
interviewStart.subtitle: Choose your target role. Interviews usually take 15-20 minutes. We will try to enable screen, camera, and microphone recording automatically, but the interview can continue without it.
interviewStart.grantAccessError: Could not access screen, camera, or microphone before start. Interview can still continue.
interviewStart.noTemplates: No public templates for this role.
interviewStart.recordingHint: Recording is attempted automatically. If permissions are denied, interview still continues.

qa_engineer.label: QA Engineer
qa_engineer.desc: Automation, test strategy, and quality workflows

data_scientist.label: Data Scientist
data_scientist.desc: Models, experiments, analytics, and production AI

product_manager.label: Product Manager
product_manager.desc: Roadmaps, delivery, metrics, and stakeholder alignment

mobile_engineer.label: Mobile Engineer
mobile_engineer.desc: iOS, Android, React Native, and Flutter

interview.reportGenerationFailed: Report generation failed. Please retry finishing the interview.
interview.question: Question {current} of {total}
interview.recordingDescription: Recording starts automatically at interview launch. If screen permission is denied, the interview still continues and camera self-view remains available.
interview.codingTaskHint: Use the code workspace for the implementation itself. Use the answer box for reasoning, tests, and trade-offs.
interview.sqlTaskHint: Use the SQL workspace for the query itself. Use the answer box for schema reasoning, result validation, and optimization trade-offs.

codingWorkspace.title: Code workspace
codingWorkspace.description: Draft the implementation here, then use the answer box below to explain trade-offs, tests, and edge cases.
codingWorkspace.saveFailed: Failed to save coding task draft
codingWorkspace.placeholder: Write the coding task solution here. This draft is stored as a raw artifact for the final report.
codingWorkspace.answerPlaceholder: Explain key decisions, tests, edge cases, and trade-offs...

sqlWorkspace.title: SQL workspace
sqlWorkspace.description: Draft the SQL query here, then use the answer box below to explain joins, validation steps, and optimization choices.
sqlWorkspace.placeholder: Write the SQL query here. This draft is stored as a raw artifact for the final report and sandbox validation.
sqlWorkspace.answerPlaceholder: Explain schema assumptions, validation steps, and performance considerations...

interview.completeDescription: You've answered all {count} questions. Generate your assessment report now.
interview.analysisDuration: AI is generating your assessment report. This usually takes 20-40 seconds.
interview.reportDelayed: Report generation is taking longer than usual. Refresh this page in a few moments.
interview.voiceHint: Hold the mic, then review the transcript before sending.
interview.latestTranscript: Latest transcript captured. Edit the draft below before sending.
interview.placeholderCode: Paste code or pseudocode here, then explain the key decisions and edge cases...
interview.placeholderText: Type your answer... (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for a new line)

report.title: Assessment report
report.recordingFailed: Report generated successfully, but interview recording upload failed.
report.recordingSkipped: Report generated without a recording upload.
